description: Canonical retention classes and assignment rules for the Lattice Vault subsystem.

short_term.description: Low-risk operational artifacts with rapid decay.

standard.description: Default governed artifacts with normal retention.

long_term.description: Governance, lineage, and constitutional artifacts requiring durable retention.

rules.description: Long-term records are irreversible except via governance amendment.
Retention class must match the record type’s assignment rule.
